schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Consumable effect values and timing are not present in this file. Add explicit healing and resource restoration values when sourced.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 50 / sell 5).
